reviews.name: Jeannet Alvarez
reviews.text: Beautiful house to staycation for the whole family, clean, quiet, relaxing. Rose, Tom, and Lotlot and Shaki, so kind and friendly to us. For 2 weeks to stay all my family are enjoy and happy especially the pool. It's nice to come back soon next year. It's a lovely homey house place.

reviews.name: Carsten Köbke
reviews.text: Friendly hosts, nice rooms and the pool is refreshing.

reviews.name: Sabrina Renzhofer
reviews.text: Dear Rose, dear Thomas, dear Lot-Lot, thank you so much again for the wonderful time we spent with you! The two houses are beautifully furnished and perfectly equipped. We felt right at home from day one. The pool is a true highlight — we spent so many wonderful hours there. We will definitely come back!

reviews.name: Lisa Hassler
reviews.text: Hey, I'm Lisa! My family and I stayed at Felisa's Guesthouse for three weeks. We were received very lovingly and everything was shown to us in peace. There was a very positive and warm atmosphere and we all felt very comfortable! The exchange with Rosemarie and Thomas was flawless for the entire time. The location of Felisa's Guesthouse is beautifully quiet and the property is also fenced. The premises were clean and beautifully furnished! The pool was our highlight! A clear recommendation from the heart!

reviews.name: Blanca Gonzales
reviews.text: Great place 💖💖💖

reviews.name: Giox Nuñez Barlis
reviews.text: yeah ba! 🔥

reviews.name: Sharon Haigh
reviews.text: A great place to be with friends and family, budget-friendly, and perfect for creating meaningful memories. You can't go wrong with Felisa's guesthouse!

reviews.name: Dan Kil
reviews.text: We had a superb stay with our hosts. Very clean facilities and welcoming vibes. We will be back ❤

reviews.name: Tobias Höner
reviews.text: It's a very child friendly and safe place in Davao. We loved the pool and the hosts are very helpful and friendly. Next time we stay for sure again in Felisa's Guesthouse.

reviews.name: Manuel Mostoles
reviews.text: When in Davao City, I always make sure that I stay here. This place is awesome and people are very nice. It feels like home for me.

reviews.name: Manuel Abogadie
reviews.text: This place is perfect for those who want to stay near downtown Davao yet still enjoy the quietness and privacy. The place is clean and well maintained, pool is very nice, rooms have superb air conditioning, internet is available, and the hosts are very accommodating.

reviews.name: Nomad63
reviews.text: If you are looking for a great place to stay, Felisa's Guesthouse is the spot. You'll feel right at home. Tom, Rose and Lot Lot are there for any questions and suggestions you may need. The guest house is a wonderful place with a beautiful pool, clean rooms and great location.

reviews.name: GOEUN LEE
reviews.text: Hi, I'm Grace! I visited with my mom and pastor. It was my first time in the Philippines. I was fascinated by the wonderful swimming pool 🏊🏻‍♀️ and the best breakfast 🍳. I was satisfied with the clean room, too. I'll remember every moment spent here. Thank you so much!

reviews.name: Annie Bananie
reviews.text: I can't say enough great things about our stay here. The place has everything we need to have a relaxing get-away from the hustle and bustle. Super quiet, spotlessly clean and comfy. Whether you are staying for two nights or several weeks, this is the perfect place.

reviews.name: Jennirose Del Mindo-Cunanan
reviews.text: Highly recommended! Kuya Tom and Ate Rose are wonderful hosts. The guesthouse is very clean and complete. It is located in a quiet neighborhood yet close to everything you need in the city.

reviews.name: She La
reviews.text: What a treat! You get special hosts, very good accommodations and the most delectable food. I highly recommend staying in this BnB. Our hosts planned a wonderful program for us, including a trip to the island. Everything was perfect.

reviews.name: Pauline Anne Ferrero
reviews.text: We had the privilege of staying at Felisa's Guesthouse for 3 days and 2 nights. We'd like to thank Felisa's Guesthouse for their generosity and kindness. We had a wonderful, relaxing, and leisurely stay. The hosts were very accommodating and the facilities were excellent.

reviews.name: Regina Yambao
reviews.text: Thank you Rose and Tom for the very warm accommodation and also Maning and Lotlot for taking care of our needs, especially for my mother who is a picky eater 😂. At home kaayo mi 🥰 Daghan kaayong Salamat ❣️

reviews.name: Maureen Sotero
reviews.text: Perfect

reviews.name: Melvin Hipolito
reviews.text: My wife and I stayed in this place for 7 weeks. Very quiet place and you will not even feel you are very close to downtown Davao. You can have all the rest and privacy you want. The pool is warm around the clock and air conditioning in the bedrooms is superb. I will come back to this place again.

reviews.name: Johan Say
reviews.text: Had a blast on our stay. Very convenient with complete amenities. Hosts and co-hosts are very accommodating. Would love to go back. Super friendly with big groups of kids and seniors alike. Never had a problem on our stay. It was a wonderful vacation for our family. Everybody was happy. Kudos to the owners! :)

reviews.name: P H
reviews.text: My family and I liked the place a lot. The owners are very kind. The apartment is huge and has a nice terrace. The kitchen and the dining room/living room were big enough for the whole family (we were 9 in total). We were close to shopping centers and restaurants. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Katrin Su
reviews.text: PERFECT PLACE TO SPEND PRECIOUS & PRIVATE TIME WITH YOUR LOVED ONES! Everything was perfect. Comfy beds, complete kitchen, tidy & clean and the private pool is a gamechanger. ♥️ It's in the heart of Davao yet private. The hosts are so nice and accommodating! Definitely stay here when you're in Davao.

reviews.name: Marilyn Triunfo
reviews.text: I stayed in this place during my vacation in the Philippines. The place is really nice, clean, and peaceful. The people are very warm, funny, and always ready to help. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Lele K
reviews.text: Beautiful house with clean, nice pool. Our stay was wonderful, with great food, nice people and lots of help whenever we needed. The area is very nice too, a lot to explore. Hopefully we can visit again someday!

reviews.name: Håvard Haus
reviews.text: We have stayed many times at Felisa's guesthouse and can highly recommend it. The place is clean, well maintained and the host is super helpful and friendly. Well worth the money.

reviews.name: Rommel Lagmay
reviews.text: Perfect! It's not a guesthouse, it's a home! The owners and caretakers are super friendly. Ma'am Rosemarie, Ms. Lotlot, Ken and Mr. Thomas were all very welcoming. Very hospitable hosts. The place is clean and well maintained. The rooms are spacious and have all the basic amenities that all travelers need. It's a secured area and very peaceful.

reviews.name: Grace Locsin
reviews.text: Highly recommended. We often stay here for family times. It's lovely how we can unwind within the city. Close to everything and there's a pool! The internet is fast and the staff are very friendly.

reviews.name: Carola Walter
reviews.text: The pool is fantastic and completely private. The apartment is spacious, and with the extension, our children could even have their own separate room. The host family is very kind and accommodating. We'll be back!

reviews.name: David Davies
reviews.text: Wonderful place to stay, great hosts, and in a central area. Will definitely stay there again.

reviews.name: Francisco Priego
reviews.text: Nice ang place and elegant!

reviews.name: Alfredo Baguio
reviews.text: Great place to rest, swim and unwind.
